2026-04-06T16:16:16.5052101Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5052664Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5053092Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5053470Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5053783Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5054019Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5054176Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5054354Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5054523Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5054752Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5054955Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5055243Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-06T16:16:16.5055531Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If omitted, removes labels from the item that triggered this workflow.","type":"number"},"labels":{"description":"Label names to remove (e.g., ['bug', 'needs-triage']). Labels that don't exist on the item are silently skipped. At least one label must be provided.","items":{"type":"string"},"minItems":1,"type":"array"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":["labels"],"type":"object"},"name":"remove_labels"},{"description":"Assign one or more GitHub users to an issue. Use this to delegate work to specific team members. Users must have access to the repository.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"assignee":{"description":"Single GitHub username to assign. Use 'assignees' array for multiple users.","type":"string"},"assignees":{"description":"GitHub usernames to assign to the issue (e.g., ['octocat', 'mona']). Users must have access to the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"issue_number":{"description":"Issue number to assign users to. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 543 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/543). If omitted, assigns to the issue that triggered this workflow.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":["issue_number"],"type":"object"},"name":"assign_to_user"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. Use this when you cannot accomplish what was requested because the required functionality is missing or access is restricted.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"alternatives":{"description":"Any workarounds, manual steps, or alternative approaches the user could take (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"Explanation of why this tool is needed or what information you want to share about the limitation (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"tool":{"description":"Optional: Name or description of the missing tool or capability (max 128 characters). Be specific about what functionality is needed.","type":"string"}},"required":["reason"],"type":"object"},"name":"missing_tool"},{"description":"Log a transparency message when no significant actions are needed. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"message":{"description":"Status or completion message to log. Should explain what was analyzed and the outcome (e.g., 'Code review complete - no issues found', 'Analysis complete - all tests passing').","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":["message"],"type":"object"},"name":"noop"},{"description":"Report that data or information needed to complete the task is not available. If provided with repo, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"page":{"description":"Page number for pagination (min 1)","minimum":1,"type":"number"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"query":{"description":"Search query using GitHub issues search syntax","type":"string"},"repo":{"description":"Optional repository name. CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 comment(s) can be added. Target: *.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"The comment text in Markdown format. Provide helpful, relevant information that adds value to the conversation.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"item_number":{"description":"The issue, pull request, or discussion number to comment on. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. `sdk/playwright/Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright/`\\n**Triggered by:** PR #57806 by `@azure-sdk`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nVersion `1.1.0-beta.1` was released (2026-04-06) with an upgrade to API version `2026-02-01-preview`, introducing:\\n- `Identity` property (`ManagedServiceIdentity`) on `PlaywrightWorkspaceData` and `PlaywrightWorkspacePatch`\\n- `Reporting` property (`PlaywrightEnablementStatus?`) on `PlaywrightWorkspaceProperties` and `PlaywrightWorkspaceUpdateProperties`\\n- `StorageUri` property (`Uri`) on `PlaywrightWorkspaceProperties` and `PlaywrightWorkspaceUpdateProperties`\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- The `Examples` section of the README contains only a generic link to [Azure SDK .NET management samples]((aka.ms/redacted) — no service-specific code snippets exist\\n- There are no snippet-backed sample test files under `tests/Samples/` (the directory does not exist)\\n- The new `Identity` (Managed Service Identity), `Reporting`, and `StorageUri` properties introduced in `1.1.0-beta.1` are documented only in the CHANGELOG, not reflected in any README example or code sample\\n- The `Key concepts` section is a stub pointing to generic SDK documentation with no Playwright-specific content describing workspaces, quota, or other service concepts\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File:** paragraph with a brief description of the key resource types:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nThe `Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright` library manages the following resource types:\\n\\n- **PlaywrightWorkspace** (`PlaywrightWorkspaceResource`) — the top-level resource representing a Microsoft Playwright Testing workspace. It exposes CRUD operations and contains properties such as `Identity` (for Managed Service Identity), `Reporting` (to enable/disable built-in reporting), and `StorageUri` (the URI of an associated storage account).\\n\\nKey concepts of the Azure Resource Manager SDK for .NET can be found [here]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n```\\n\\nIn `## Examples`, replace the current single-link paragraph with a snippet placeholder (the tooling will inject actual code after the snippet test file is created):\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Create a Playwright Workspace\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Create a Playwright Workspace with Managed Identity\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Enable Reporting on a Playwright Workspace\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\nFor more code samples, see the [.NET Management Library Code Samples]((aka.ms/redacted)\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate a new test sample file at:  \\n**`sdk/playwright/Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright/tests/Samples/Sample1_PlaywrightWorkspace.cs`**\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Core.TestFramework;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample1_PlaywrightWorkspace : SamplesBase\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [SyncOnly]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample builds\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateOrUpdateWorkspace()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateOrUpdate\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroup.GetPlaywrightWorkspaces();\\n\\n            string workspaceName = \\u0026#34;myPlaywrightWorkspace\\u0026#34;;\\n            AzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceData data = new PlaywrightWorkspaceData(location);\\n\\n            ArmOperation operation = await workspaces\\n                .CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, workspaceName, data);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource workspace = operation.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created workspace: {workspace.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [SyncOnly]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample builds\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateWorkspaceWithManagedIdentity()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateWithManagedIdentity\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroup.GetPlaywrightWorkspaces();\\n\\n            string workspaceName = \\u0026#34;myPlaywrightWorkspace\\u0026#34;;\\n            AzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceData data = new PlaywrightWorkspaceData(location)\\n            {\\n                Identity = new ManagedServiceIdentity(ManagedServiceIdentityType.SystemAssigned)\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation operation = await workspaces\\n                .CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, workspaceName, data);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource workspace = operation.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Workspace principal ID: {workspace.Data.Identity?.PrincipalId}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [SyncOnly]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample builds\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task EnableReporting()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_EnableReporting\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource workspace = await resourceGroup\\n                .GetPlaywrightWorkspaceAsync(\\u0026#34;myPlaywrightWorkspace\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspacePatch patch = new PlaywrightWorkspacePatch\\n            {\\n                Properties = new PlaywrightWorkspaceUpdateProperties\\n                {\\n                    Reporting = PlaywrightEnablementStatus.Enabled\\n                }\\n            };\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource updated = await workspace.UpdateAsync(patch);\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Reporting status: {updated.Data.Properties?.Reporting}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nThe snippet names used above must match exactly between the test file `#region` tags and the README placeholder fences:\\n- `Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateOrUpdate`\\n- `Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateWithManagedIdentity`\\n- `Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_EnableReporting`\\n\\nRefer to `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/tests/samples/Sample1_HelloWorld.cs` as a canonical example.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README CreateWorkspaceWithManagedIdentity()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateWithManagedIdentity\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroup.GetPlaywrightWorkspaces();\\n\\n            string workspaceName = \\u0026#34;myPlaywrightWorkspace\\u0026#34;;\\n            AzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceData data = new PlaywrightWorkspaceData(location)\\n            {\\n                Identity = new ManagedServiceIdentity(ManagedServiceIdentityType.SystemAssigned)\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation operation = await workspaces\\n                .CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, workspaceName, data);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource workspace = operation.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Workspace principal ID: {workspace.Data.Identity?.PrincipalId}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [SyncOnly]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample builds\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task EnableReporting()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_EnableReporting\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource workspace = await resourceGroup\\n                .GetPlaywrightWorkspaceAsync(\\u0026#34;myPlaywrightWorkspace\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspacePatch patch = new PlaywrightWorkspacePatch\\n            {\\n                Properties = new PlaywrightWorkspaceUpdateProperties\\n                {\\n                    Reporting = PlaywrightEnablementStatus.Enabled\\n                }\\n            };\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource updated = await workspace.UpdateAsync(patch);\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Reporting status: {updated.Data.Properties?.Reporting}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nThe snippet names used above must match exactly between the test file `#region` tags and the README placeholder fences:\\n- `Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateOrUpdate`\\n- `Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateWithManagedIdentity`\\n- `Sample_PlaywrightWorkspace_EnableReporting`\\n\\nRefer to `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/tests/samples/Sample1_HelloWorld.cs` as a canonical example.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README
